title: Add CreatorPack AI to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [CreatorPack AI](https://creatorpack.qhero.net/) to build
- CreatorPack AI generates multilingual social media content packs, built by Qhero.

Fixes #10908

gist.headline: CreatorPack AI joins the garden
gist.blurb: Qhero just planted CreatorPack AI in our community greenhouse! It's a slick new tool for generating multilingual social media content packs on the fly.
gist.summary: Added CreatorPack AI, a tool by Qhero for generating multilingual social media content packs, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use CreatorPack AI from the community greenhouse to streamline their social media content creation across multiple languages.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a social media content pack generator (CreatorPack AI). Visual symbols: social media icons, language/translation symbols (speech bubbles), packing/boxes (packs). Characters: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot packing boxes of social media posts.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and a chunky monitor robot packing glowing social media icons and colorful speech bubbles into a wooden crate. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. The bee wears a tiny postal worker hat. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
